productDisplayName: Clarks Women Shona Fringe Leather Silver Flats
description: Take feminine dressing to a new level with these Shona Fringe leather sandals from clarks. The silver beading and mother of pearl detailing gives it an added edge. Team it with dainty skirts and tops for a very girly look. Upper Leather thong straps for durability and comfort Leather toe separator and leather lining for greater comfort Silver beaded design with mother of pearl embellishment on silver leather for glam style Midsole Lushly padded leather lined footbed with embossed paisley print for absolute comfort Outsole Kitten heel for added style Rubber outsole with engraved paisley design on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the heel for greater grip shoe care Use a branded leather polish to keep your shoes shining Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or brush to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
